text:
The Mom's Help (, Mama Help—base kanji lit. "Children's Future") foundation is a charity dedicated to the aid and rescue of impoverished children. Hunter × Hunter - Chapter 405 

Background

In 1991, the chairman of the foundation was Risnorth, a famed philanthropist with a secret past as a human trafficker, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 396 who was murdered on August 19 th that same year. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

On the 10 th anniversary of Risnorth's death, a newscast broadcast on the Black Whale mentions Mom's Help as an example of his his philanthropic activities. 

References
